items.title: TwoTower: Diffusion LM on Frozen Autoregressive Backbone
items.core_innovation: Diffusion LM wrapper on frozen AR backbone for parallel decoding

items.title: GSRQ: Gain-Shape Residual Quantization for Sub-1-bit KV Cache
items.core_innovation: Fixes k-means degeneracy for sub-1-bit KV cache compression
items.significance: Enables much longer context windows with lower memory cost

items.title: Lynx: Progressive Speculative Quantization for KV Transfer
items.core_innovation: Speculative quantization scheme for disaggregated KV transfer
items.significance: Cuts network-exposed latency in long-context serving

items.title: OrbitQuant: Data-Agnostic Quantization for Diffusion Transformers
items.core_innovation: Calibration-free PTQ for DiTs across timesteps/prompts
items.significance: Removes need to re-fit calibration per checkpoint/modality

items.title: Beyond Activation Alignment: Alignment-Diversity Tradeoff in Quantization
items.core_innovation: Shows perplexity-based sensitivity misleads for reasoning tasks

items.title: Staleness-Learning Rate Scaling Laws for Asynchronous RLHF
items.core_innovation: Formal treatment of stale rollouts in async GRPO training
items.significance: Guides LR tuning for high-throughput RLHF pipelines

items.title: Denser != Better: Limits of On-Policy Self-Distillation
items.core_innovation: Reveals failure modes of self-distillation in continual post-training
items.significance: Cautionary result for a popular anti-forgetting technique

items.title: WattGPU: Predicting Inference Power and Latency on Unseen GPUs/LLMs
items.core_innovation: Generalizable predictor for LLM-GPU energy/latency matching
items.significance: Practical tool for deployment cost/efficiency planning

items.title: Black-Box Inference of LLM Architectural Properties
items.core_innovation: Extracts architecture details even with restricted single-logit API
items.significance: Reveals limits of provider API restrictions as protection

items.title: Mistral AI Releases Leanstral 1.5
items.core_innovation: 119B code agent model specialized for Lean 4 proof assistant
items.significance: 100% on miniF2F, Apache 2.0 licensed, strong formal reasoning

items.title: Is One Layer Enough? Single Transformer Layer Matches Full RL Training
items.core_innovation: Single-layer training matches full-parameter RL fine-tuning
items.significance: Could drastically cut RLHF compute costs if validated

items.title: Hugging Face and Cerebras bring Gemma 4 to real-time voice AI
items.core_innovation: Cerebras hardware acceleration for Gemma 4 voice inference
items.significance: Demonstrates real-time low-latency voice AI deployment

items.title: Google AI Introduces TabFM: Tabular Foundation Model
